items.title: Lampard's Coventry return to Prem after 25 years
items.summary: Coventry City will return to the Premier League for the first time in 25 years after securing their promotion from the Championship with a draw at Blackburn.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: ASU WR Jordyn Tyson solidifies first-round draft status in front of 20 teams
items.summary: Arizona State wide receiver Jordyn Tyson finally had his private workout for NFL teams on Friday.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Wolvaardt, Dercksen seal SA chase after India stumble with bat
items.summary: Sloppy display in the field undermines efforts to defend target of 158 in Durban
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
